{{Infobox character
| name = Jameson Allbright
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jameson Allbright]] is the Head of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jameson Allbright]] is of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Jameson Allbright]] has pure white hair and a long beard.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jameson Allbright]] is the saintly old [[Guild Head]] of the [[Pilgrims]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
